sections.paragraph: ἀνατολή, ῆς, ἡ [ἀνατέλλω; mostly of a heavenly body rising above the horizon] rising: sg., an astronomical term used in astrology, of a heavenly body Mt 2:2, 9.—Of the sun, with focus on geographical position = east, orient, pl. Mt 2:1; 8:11; 24:27; Lk 13:29; sg. Rv 21:13;with ἥλιος in same sense and sg. Rv 7:2; 16:12.—In imagery of the Messiah = the dawn from heaven Lk 1:78.
